zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Montfort於1252年9月29日出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾肯尼爾沃斯時，她的父親Simon V de Montfort44歲，母親Eleanor of England38歲。她於1278年10月13日與Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales在威爾士結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1282年6月19日在英國威爾斯尼德阿享年29歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯安格萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Montfort于1252年9月29日出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾肯尼爾沃斯时，她的父亲Simon V de Montfort44岁，母亲Eleanor of England38岁。她于1278年10月13日与Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales在威尔士结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1282年6月19日在英国威尔斯尼德阿享年29岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯安格萊。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Montfort was born on 29 September 1252, in Kenilworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Simon V de Montfort, was 44 and her mother, Eleanor of England, was 38. She married Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales on 13 October 1278, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 19 June 1282, in Aber, Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Montfort est née le 29 septembre 1252, à Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon V de Montfort, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Eleanor of England, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales le 13 octobre 1278, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 juin 1282, à Aber, Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor de Montfort am 29. September 1252 in Kenilworth, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon V de Montfort 44 und ihre Mutter Eleanor of England 38. Sie hat am 13. Oktober 1278 in Wales Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Juni 1282 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Aber, Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Montfort è nata il il 29 settembre 1252 nel Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Simon V de Montfort, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Eleanor of England, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales il 13 ottobre 1278, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 19 giugno 1282, nel Aber, Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Montfortが1252年9月29日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアケニルウオルスで生まれた時，父Simon V de Montfortは44歳，母Eleanor of Englandは38歳であった。1278年10月13日にウェールズでLlywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Walesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1282年6月19日にイギリスウェールズグウイネッドアバーで29歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズアングレセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Montfort(이)가 1252년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 켄이워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon V de Montfort(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor of England(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1278년 10월 13일 웨일스에서 Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1282년 6월 19일 영국 웨일스 그윈드 압어에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에 묻혔다.

pt.29 September 1252–19 June 1282: 29 de setembro de 1252–19 de junho de 1282
pt.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Montfort nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1252, em Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon V de Montfort, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor of England, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales em 13 de outubro de 1278, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de junho de 1282, em Aber, Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Montfort родилась 29 сентября 1252 г. в местности кенилворт, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Simon V de Montfort было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor of England, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales 13 октября 1278 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 19 июня 1282 г. в местности абир, гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.29 September 1252–19 June 1282: 29 de septiembre de 1252–19 de junio de 1282
es.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor de Montfort nació el 29 de septiembre de 1252, en Kenilworth, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon V de Montfort, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Eleanor of England, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Llywelyn ap Gruffydd Prince of North Wales el 13 de octubre de 1278, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de junio de 1282, en Aber, Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido.
